name: Chattanooga
tagline: Gig City with the Fastest Internet, No State Income Tax, and Outdoor Paradise
description: Chattanooga is a FIRE dream: no state income tax, the fastest municipal internet in the United States courtesy of EPB Fiber Optics, and a cost of living well below the national average. Nestled along the Tennessee River at the base of Lookout Mountain, the city has transformed from an industrial center into an outdoor recreation capital with world-class rock climbing, mountain biking, and paddling. The revitalized downtown features excellent restaurants, a thriving arts scene, and the stunning Tennessee Aquarium.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.internetSpeed: 300+ Mbps average (EPB Fiber offers up to 25 Gbps)
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – safe neighborhoods; improving downtown area
quickFacts.climate: Humid subtropical with mild winters, warm summers, and long pleasant spring and fall seasons

housing.description: 1BR apartment in Northshore, Highland Park, or the Southside

dining.description: Casual dining 2x/week at local spots like Champy's or Taqueria Jalisco

healthcare.description: ACA marketplace Silver plan; CHI Memorial and Erlanger hospitals nearby

transportation.description: Paid-off car with basic insurance; free CARTA electric shuttle downtown

entertainment.description: Hiking Lookout Mountain, rock climbing at Sunset Rock, river walks, free gallery nights

1M.lifestyle: A one-bedroom on the Northshore or Southside runs about $1,000, and with no state income tax the full $3,333 goes to living costs. You cook at home most nights, eat out casually a couple of times a week at places like Champy's, and spend free time hiking Lookout Mountain, climbing at Sunset Rock, or walking the Riverwalk. EPB's fiber internet keeps streaming and connectivity costs low.

housing.description: 2BR apartment on the Northshore or a cottage in St. Elmo at the base of Lookout Mountain

dining.description: Dining out 3-4x/week; enjoying the Southside and downtown restaurant scene

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with dental and vision; good hospital access in the metro

transportation.description: Reliable car for mountain roads, full coverage insurance, bike for Riverwalk commuting

entertainment.description: Tennessee Aquarium membership, Lookout Wild bouldering gym, live music, Riverbend Festival

2M.lifestyle: A two-bedroom on the Northshore or a cottage in St. Elmo at the base of Lookout Mountain, dining out several times a week at the growing Southside restaurant scene, and a gym or climbing membership. Weekends are for biking, paddling the Tennessee River, or attending events like the Riverbend Festival. No state income tax and affordable costs leave a healthy monthly margin.

housing.description: 3BR home in Lookout Mountain, Signal Mountain, or a luxury loft on the Northshore

dining.description: Regular fine dining at St. John's, Alleia, and Public House; wine tasting events

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with low deductibles and comprehensive coverage

transportation.description: Late-model SUV for mountain access, premium insurance, seasonal gear hauling

entertainment.description: UTC Mocs games, Tivoli Theatre season, private climbing guides, golf, river tours

3M.lifestyle: A three-bedroom home on Lookout Mountain or Signal Mountain, or a luxury loft on the Northshore, with regular dinners at places like St. John's and Alleia. A late-model SUV handles mountain roads, and there is room for a golf membership, Tivoli Theatre season tickets, and regular travel. At Chattanooga's cost level with no state income tax, $10K a month covers an affluent life with significant margin.

housing.description: Custom home on Lookout Mountain or Signal Mountain with panoramic valley views

dining.description: Fine dining several times per week, private chef for entertaining, farm-to-table partnerships

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine, executive wellness, comprehensive private insurance

transportation.description: Luxury SUV, second vehicle for mountain trails, premium insurance

entertainment.description: Private climbing trips, guided rafting expeditions, country club, philanthropy galas

domesticHelp.description: Weekly deep cleaning, landscaping, mountain property maintenance

luxuryExtras.description: Smokies cabin weekends, quarterly travel, outdoor gear upgrades, community philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: A custom home on Lookout Mountain or Signal Mountain with valley views, a housekeeper who comes weekly, and regular fine dining at Chattanooga's best restaurants. Weekend trips to a Smokies cabin, business class flights for longer travel, and concierge healthcare are all comfortable in this budget. The low cost base and zero state income tax leave generous room for travel and community involvement.

housing.description: Trophy estate on Lookout Mountain or a sprawling compound on Signal Mountain with acreage

dining.description: Full-time personal chef, exclusive wine dinners, catered gatherings and private events

healthcare.description: Top-tier concierge practice, medical travel to Nashville or Atlanta specialists, wellness team

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, private car service, chartered flights from CHA

entertainment.description: Major philanthropy, international adventure travel, art collecting, exclusive memberships

domesticHelp.description: Full-time estate manager, housekeeper, personal assistant, property caretaker

luxuryExtras.description: Second home in the Smokies, first-class international travel, angel investing, foundation work

10M.lifestyle: A large estate on Lookout Mountain or Signal Mountain, a second home in the Smokies, a full-time housekeeper and property manager, and a cook who comes in several times a week. First-class travel, concierge healthcare with specialist access in Nashville or Atlanta, and generous community involvement are all well covered. At Chattanooga costs with no state income tax, this budget provides a very comfortable, well-staffed life with large monthly margins.
